zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期盘整偏空震荡
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在1990.95附近徘徊，较24小时内波动幅度有限，短期整体呈现盘整格局。从均线角度看，SMA(20)位于2013.17之上，价格位于均线下方，暗示短期偏空，但尚未形成明显下跌动能，需关注均线支撑的反弹可能性。

MACD指标显示-20.63，虽信号线数据缺失，但负值表明空方力量仍占优，短期上涨动能不足。缺少RSI数据限制了超买超卖分析，但结合价格与均线关系，可推测市场情绪谨慎，投资者多维持观望态度。

支撑位方面，下方1980-1982区间为短期关键支撑，若跌破可能引发进一步下探。阻力位主要集中在1995-2000附近，若突破则短线反弹空间可至2013均线附近，但需伴随成交量确认，否则易遇阻回落。

综合来看，短线操作建议以防守为主，谨慎逢高减仓或低位轻仓试多，避免追涨杀跌。关注关键支撑1980和阻力2000附近的价格反应，可适当设置止损以控制风险，等待明确趋势信号再加仓操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 1990.95, holding within a narrow intraday range between 1981.88 and 1993.92. Price action remains mildly bearish in the short term, primarily because ETH continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 2013.17. This suggests momentum has weakened after recent selling pressure, while the nearly flat 24-hour performance indicates that buyers and sellers are currently in equilibrium near the psychologically important 2000 level.

The negative MACD reading at -20.63 reinforces the cautious outlook, signaling that bearish momentum still dominates despite the absence of aggressive downside continuation. Although RSI data is unavailable, the compressed trading range implies a potentially oversold stabilization phase rather than a strong recovery trend. If Ethereum cannot reclaim the SMA(20) zone decisively, rallies may continue to face resistance from short-term sellers looking to exit positions near break-even levels.

Key support is forming around 1980, with stronger downside protection near 1950 if bearish pressure accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance sits near 2000 followed by the SMA(20) region around 2013–2020. A breakout above this resistance cluster could improve sentiment and open the path toward 2050. However, failure to sustain above 1980 may trigger renewed downside volatility, especially if broader crypto market sentiment weakens.

From a trading perspective, conservative traders may prefer waiting for confirmation above 2013 before considering stronger long positions. Short-term range traders could monitor rebounds from the 1980 support area while keeping tight stop losses below 1950. Bearish traders may remain active under the moving average resistance zone, though risk management is essential given Ethereum’s tendency for rapid reversals during low-volume consolidation periods.
